_comment_secrets: Connection strings are intentionally empty here. Provide real values via environment variables (ConnectionStrings__Mongo, Redis__ConnectionString) or 'dotnet user-secrets'. Never commit real secrets to this file. See README / CFG-9.4.
_comment_adminapi: ApiKey is a secret: leave empty here and provide via env (AdminApi__ApiKey) or user-secrets. The API fails closed (401) when it is unset. AllowedOrigins lists the browser origins permitted by CORS (CFG-9.6).
